---
title: "Catherine Harriet Lee"
---

## Catherine Harriet Lee

**Dates:** (1848-1914)

### Description

contributor to <i>MP</i> (1887), novelist with her sister [[person:861]Mary Susanna Lee]

### Biography

See the obituary of Mary Susanna Lee in the <i>Athenaeum</i> (29 August 1908) 240.
[census returns, registers of birth and death]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
